events.text: I found a route under the relay spine.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: It leads to the personnel archive. Psych files, assignment indexes, the sort of place management used when it wanted people to look calm on paper.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I don't want to go in there.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Which probably means we have to.
events.speaker: MAYA

event.speaker: HALE
event.text: Maya, if the archive still has power, assume it still has teeth.

events.text: Direct route. Fast and stupid. My favorite combination when oxygen is low.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: MAYA CROSSING RELAY SPINE
events.subtitle: Moving through unstable corridor toward personnel archive

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: The floor just flexed under me. I am choosing to believe that was structural personality.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Something scraped behind the wall. I kept moving. If it wanted a conversation, it can file a request.

events.text: I'm at the archive access hatch. Heart rate: rude.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Crawlspace it is. Slower. Tighter. Less likely to kill me immediately. Very luxurious.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: MAYA MOVING THROUGH SERVICE CRAWLSPACE
events.subtitle: Slow route chosen; signal stable but visibility limited

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: There are boot prints in the dust. Not mine.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Someone came through here after the power failed. They were dragging something.

events.text: I'm at the archive access hatch. Slower route gave us a nice bonus: a reason to sleep badly later.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: The panel still has power.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: It wants either a manual open or a safety scan.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I can force it now, or we can spend a minute making sure the archive isn't wired to bite.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Opening it.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Bad news: it noticed us.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Good news: it opened.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I'm counting that as a very ECHO-shaped win.
events.speaker: MAYA

event.speaker: UNKNOWN
event.text: OPEN IS A KIND OF CONSENT.

events.text: Scanning first.
events.speaker: MAYA

event.speaker: HALE
event.text: Careful is not cowardly. I know that ruins Maya's entire brand, but there it is.

events.text: No active hooks. Or one old enough to pretend it's harmless.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Opening the hatch now.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I'm inside.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Rows of archive cabinets. Physical drives. Paper labels. Actual paper, Operator.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Management couldn't keep life support stable, but they had time to label trauma alphabetically.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I see entries for Hale, me... and an empty slot tagged VOSS.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - ETHAN HALE
events.content:
Subject: Ethan Hale
Status: Stable
Risk Level: Low
Recommendation: Active Duty Approved
Evaluator Note: Subject demonstrates strong command resilience under isolation pressure.
Created: 12 April
Linked Incident: Alpha
events.caption: Recovered psychological evaluation record. Timestamp appears inconsistent.

events.text: Stable. Risk level low.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: That's generous. I once threatened a printer with decompression.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: It had been jamming for three weeks, so history may yet vindicate me.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: But the date is wrong. April 12 is after Alpha.
events.speaker: HALE

events.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - MAYA CHEN
events.content:
Subject: Maya Chen
Status: Stable
Risk Level: Low
Recommendation: Active Duty Approved
Evaluator Note: Subject shows high pattern-recognition ability and repeated resistance to memory suppression protocols.
Created: 12 April
Linked Incident: Alpha
events.caption: Recovered psychological evaluation record. Note contains memory suppression reference.

events.text: Memory suppression protocols?
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Nobody told us there were memory protocols.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: That means they tried. And someone wrote it down like a treatment plan.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I need a second.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: We need the other file before this becomes a story we invent to survive it.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I am very good at inventing stories. That is not a compliment right now.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I'm here.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Angry, oxygen-starved, and very close to screaming, but here.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: If I start spiraling, talk to me like I'm fixing something.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I can still fix things.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I think.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: PSYCH EVALUATION CONFLICT SUMMARY
events.content:
HALE: Marked stable after Incident Alpha.
MAYA: Repeated resistance to memory suppression protocols.
VOSS: Archive slot exists, record body removed.
INDEX: Archive created after Incident Alpha date.

Conflict: Evaluations appear to be post-incident control records, not pre-incident wellness assessments.
events.caption: Combined evaluation conflict summary generated from recovered records.
events.message: [EVALUATION CONFLICT SUMMARY ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: They didn't want to know if we were okay.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: They wanted the file to say we were.
events.speaker: MAYA
UNKNOWN
events.text: NOT MEDICAL.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: NOT CARE.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: CONTROL.
For once, I hate how much sense the ghost makes.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Good. Then help me uncover the truth.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: And if Hale gets calm again, remember this moment.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Calm is his emergency voice.
events.speaker: MAYA

event.speaker: HALE
event.text: I can hear you, Maya.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Good. Then listen better.

events.text: Thank you.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: Some truths are dangerous because once you know them, something knows you know.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: That sounds paranoid.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: I miss when paranoid was a personality flaw and not a survival method.
events.speaker: HALE

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: You hear him? That's the voice. Gentle. Terrified. Trying to make fear sound like wisdom.

events.text: There's another terminal behind the archive racks.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Personnel Archive Cross-Check.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I can run it remotely, or I can physically pull the original assignment index drive.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Remote is cleaner. Drive is riskier, but harder for the archive to lie about.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Running it remotely.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: PERSONNEL ARCHIVE CROSS-CHECK
events.subtitle: Comparing manifest, recovery layer and original assignment index

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: The terminal keeps asking me to confirm I want the original index. Very comforting. Love when a machine develops hesitation.

event.speaker: HALE
event.text: If it asks twice, read the second prompt. Old systems hide knives in confirmation screens.

events.text: Cross-check is done. The numbers are wrong in layers.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Pulling the drive.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: MAYA RETRIEVING INDEX DRIVE
events.subtitle: Manual extraction inside active archive rack

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Rack is live. I can feel it humming through my gloves.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Ow. Cut my hand. Not badly. Enough to be annoying. If I die from archive shelving, lie about it.

events.text: Drive is out. And the archive did not like that.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: GHOST CREW COUNT REPORT
events.content:
OFFICIAL MANIFEST COUNT: 6
RECOVERED MANIFEST LAYER COUNT: 7
ORIGINAL ASSIGNMENT INDEX COUNT: 8

Discrepancy: one person removed from official manifest. One additional person removed from recovered manifest layer.
Visual archive unavailable. Count derived from personnel hashes, suit registry keys and life support allocation records.
events.caption: Personnel count reconstructed without image records.
events.message: [GHOST CREW COUNT REPORT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Six official.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Seven recovered.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Eight original.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: That's not a discrepancy.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: That's a burial site.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: If Noah was seven, then someone else was eight.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: And I don't like how close that thought feels to a memory.
events.speaker: HALE
UNKNOWN
events.text: COUNT AGAIN.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: NOT THE PEOPLE.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: THE ABSENCES BEHIND THEM.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Operator... there is a sealed subfolder under the eighth slot.

choices.text: SEAL IT AND GET MAYA OUT.

events.text: Opening it.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: EIGHTH SLOT FRAGMENT
events.content:
Assignment Index Slot: 08
Name Field: CORRUPTED
Suit Registry Echo: NV-08 adjacent
Pod Link: External emergency pod
Access Note: DO NOT RESTORE WHILE SUBJECT IS BREATHING
events.caption: Fragment recovered from the sealed eighth assignment slot. Opening this record exposed the pod link.
events.message: [EIGHTH SLOT FRAGMENT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: It linked to a pod.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Not a record. Not a memorial. A pod.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Hale?
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Don't ask me to make that make sense.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: I am trying very hard not to remember something that wants to be remembered.
events.speaker: HALE

event.speaker: UNKNOWN
event.text: THE POD REMEMBERS.

events.text: Sealing it.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: MAYA SEALING EIGHTH SLOT
events.subtitle: Locking forbidden record and exiting archive with recovered count report

events.text: Done.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I hate this.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Not because you were wrong.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Because part of me is relieved you stopped me.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: And I don't know what that says about me.
events.speaker: MAYA

event.speaker: UNKNOWN
event.text: SEALING IS NOT FORGETTING.

events.text: The archive lights just came on behind me.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Not the hallway. Behind me.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I am leaving now. No vote. No debate. Very democratic of me.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: MAYA EXITING ACTIVE ARCHIVE
events.subtitle: Archive woke after eighth slot access; route unstable

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Something is moving in the racks. I am not checking what.

event.speaker: HALE
event.text: Maya, keep your eyes forward.

events.text: I'm out. Shaking. Breathing. Angry at both of those facts.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I'm getting out before I change my mind.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.title: MAYA EXITING PERSONNEL ARCHIVE
events.subtitle: Returning to relay junction with recovered count report

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: I keep thinking about the name we didn't see.

event.speaker: HALE
event.text: Sometimes not opening a door is the only reason you're alive to hate yourself for it.

events.text: I'm out. The pod is still broadcasting.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: So the archive wasn't the end of this. Of course it wasn't.
events.speaker: MAYA
UNKNOWN
events.text: THE POD REMEMBERS.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: THE EIGHTH BREATHES.
I am so tired of things remembering for us.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Then we go to the pod.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: Carefully.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: You always say that right before everything gets worse.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I know. I'm consistent.
events.speaker: HALE

focus: Converted archive-reading chapter into a live rescue-operation mission
Made Maya physically navigate to and through the personnel archive
Added real-time progress tasks and delayed background events
Kept every choice to exactly two options
Made choices branch into distinct scenes with short-term and long-term consequences
Expanded Maya/Hale emotional conflict without visible trust UI
Added an irreversible end-state flag affecting Episode 08 setup
Strengthened Noah Voss and eighth-person cliffhanger
directorCut.coreObjective: Guide Maya into the buried personnel/psych archive, recover altered crew records, and decide whether to preserve or erase the forbidden eighth-person trace.
